name: The Golf Box
about: The Golf Box is a premium indoor golf training studio in Fullerton, California, focused on data-driven practice improvement. It features 16-foot-wide, centered hitting bays with 4K visuals and advanced launch monitor technology, designed for both right-handed and left-handed golfers. The facility emphasizes a distraction-free environment, offering unmanned access for members from 6 AM to midnight. Memberships start at $99 per month, providing access to real-time swing data, impact camera feedback, and a community of dedicated golfers aiming to improve their game.
why_golfers_like_it: Massive 16-foot-wide bays with centered hitting setup for lefties and righties
Real-time launch monitor data and impact camera feedback for measurable improvement
Distraction-free environment with no crowds or party atmosphere
Unmanned member access from 6 AM to midnight for flexible practice on your own schedule
Fairway-style mats that reward proper compression and punish mishits like a real course

food_and_drink.notes: No food or kitchen services mentioned on-site
No bar or alcohol services mentioned; described as a practice facility, not a sim bar

simulator_hardware.notes: High-end photometric camera launch monitors paired with GSPro software

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you must bring your own clubs. All clubs must be washed and cleaned prior to using the simulators. Cleaning supplies are available on-site if needed.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: No external food or drinks are permitted. The facility is focused on practice and does not offer food or alcohol services.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Specific time for 18 holes is not mentioned. Reservations are required, and with only two simulators, sessions are designed to avoid crowding, suggesting shorter, focused practice sessions.

faq.question: Is it kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Not explicitly mentioned. The facility is described as a serious training environment for self-motivated golfers, focused on improvement without distractions.
